// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package href

import "strings"

// Item references /org/{org}/item/{id}/{$}
func Item(org string, id string) string {
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(
		len("/org/") +
			len(org) +
			len("/item/") +
			len(id) +
			len("/"),
	)
	b.WriteString("/org/")
	b.WriteString(org)
	b.WriteString("/item/")
	b.WriteString(id)
	b.WriteString("/")
	return b.String()
}
